case_title: KARA VIRJI-GAIDHAR VS. MARY E BRADFORD et al

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MTN FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER IMPOSING SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIRJI-GAIDHAR, KARA HEARING SET FOR APR-29-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-29-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF KARA VIRJI-GAIDHAR'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER IMPOSING SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 4/1/2010 TO ANDREW J. KOPP, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00, IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SACTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn For Reconsideration Of Order Imposing Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Kara Virji-Gaidhar's Motion for Reconsideration of Order Imposing Sanctions issued on 4/1/2010 to Andrew J. Kopp, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sactions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (212)
